user.title: CLSS Shade Setup
user.description: Configure your location for LiDAR-based shade analysis. The integration will download ~30-50 MB of LiDAR data on first setup.

add_zone.title: Add Zone
add_zone.description:
Choose a name, type, and shape for the new zone.
Offsets are in meters from the configured center point.
Use CLSS viewer (clss.si) or Google Maps to measure.

add_polygon.title: Add Polygon Zone: {zone_name}
add_polygon.description:
Enter polygon vertices as meter offsets (east, north) from center.
Format: `E,N; E,N; E,N; ...`
Example: `-10,-5; 10,-5; 10,5; -10,5`
At least 3 vertices required.

add_circle.title: Add Circular Zone: {zone_name}
add_circle.description:
Define a circular zone with offset from center and radius.
Positive east = right, positive north = up.

remove_zone.title: Remove Zone
remove_zone.description: Select a custom zone to remove.

error.invalid_vertices: Invalid vertex format. Use: E,N; E,N; E,N (at least 3 vertices)
